text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Rickey. Here's a little gift for
your big day.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I know that feng shui compass of yours needed a
holder, so I made one.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thank you! You make the cutest things,
Acute! I love how soft and fluffy it is!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Hmhm, good, I'm glad, dearie. I hope you like the
design too. I sewed the yin-yang symbol myself.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I tried a method that's quite rare to see. Now
what was it called? Ummm...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: I can't for the darndest... Must've been "hip hop."

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hip-hop? I didn't think that was a sewing style.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's done by stitching different fabrics
together... Hrmm...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, patchwork? You made a patchwork yin-yang
design?!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, yes, yes—a patchwork! You're so bright,
Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I don't hold a candle to you, Acute! You're too
amazing!
